commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=55894310500593be7a20347e7e8aeaabb05343d0)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes `src/repair/pr-repair-intake.ts` to separate human/workflow metadata from repairable blockers and add optional watch-silence fingerprinting.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: the GitHub `pnpm check` log reproduces the format failure. Current-main bug reproduction is otherwise not applicable because this PR adds new automation behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and a formatting fix; ClawSweeper should not queue repair markers while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: Separate human-only PR intake signals
target.body:
## Summary
- classify ClawSweeper status/rating/merge-risk labels as metadata signals rather than automatic repair blockers
- emit `requires_human` results for PRs that only have human/workflow metadata and no repairable blocker
- avoid creating automatic repair jobs for comment-only or label-only cases when `proof: sufficient` is already present
- add an optional watch-silence fingerprint config so known watchlisted PRs stay quiet until their stable state changes

## Rationale
Repair-only intake should enqueue jobs only when there is an objective repairable blocker, such as failed checks, dirty/blocked merge state, changes requested, or unresolved actionable review threads. Stale labels and human workflow status should be reported separately for maintainer attention instead of creating repair work.

## Verification
- `corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `corepack pnpm run build:repair`
- `node --test test/repair/pr-repair-intake.test.ts`
target.author: jhacarreiro

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
